message.content:
@startuml
title Authorization token with auth_code
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #EEEEEE
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  LifeLineBorderColor #CCCCCC
  ArrowColor #333333
  ArrowThickness 1
}

participant "web" as web
participant "bff_web_api" as bff
participant "authorization_api" as auth
participant "k8s_redis" as redis

box "K8S_ZONE" #DDDDDD
  participant bff
  participant auth
  participant redis
end box

web -> bff: /api/v1/auth/token
note left of web
  Request header
  Content-Type: application/json
  Request body
  - auth_code: xxxxxx
end note

activate bff
bff -> bff: validate request
bff -> auth: /api/v1/oauth/token
note left of bff
  Request header
  Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
  Request body
  - auth_code
  note:
  - handler late limit (brute force attack)
end note

activate auth
auth -> auth: validate request
auth -> redis: check auth_code from k8s_redis
activate redis
note right of redis
  Key:
  - auth_code
  Redis object
  - user_id
  - scope
end note
redis --> auth: return redis object
deactivate redis

auth -> auth: generate JWT Token with private key
note left of auth
  Access token:
  {
    header
    - alg: rsa256
    - typ: JWT
    payload
    - iss
    - jti
    - user_id
    - iat
    - exp
    - roles
    signature
  }
end note

auth -> redis: put user session into k8s_redis
activate redis
note left of redis
  ttl: 300000 milliseconds (5 min)
  Key: user_id:xxxxx
  Redis object value:
  - access_token
  - refrech_token
end note
redis -> redis: save data
redis --> auth
deactivate redis

auth --> bff: return
deactivate auth

bff --> web: return
note right of bff
  Response header
  Content-Type: application/json
  Response body
  - accessToken
  - RefreshToken
end note
deactivate bff

@enduml
